name: Manny Pacquiao
title: Professional Boxer & Politician
bio: Filipino professional boxer and politician, the only eight-division world champion in boxing history. He also served as a senator in the Philippines.
faith: After years of gambling and womanizing, Pacquiao experienced a dramatic conversion to evangelical Christianity. He now preaches regularly at churches, studies the Bible daily, and has said his faith transformed every aspect of his life.

videos.title: Manny Pacquiao Christian Testimony
videos.note: Pacquiao has shared his dramatic conversion story many times

sources.title: Manny Pacquiao — Wikipedia
sources.note: Biography including his conversion to Christianity

sources.title: Manny Pacquiao — From Boxing Champion to Bible Preacher
sources.note: His dramatic transformation from gambling to gospel preaching

tagline: From world champion boxer to gospel preacher and senator
